message:
test(types): add property tests for serial type encoding (bd-309f)

12 proptest-based property tests covering: varint roundtrip, canonical
encoding, length consistency, integer/text/blob serial type invariants,
classification determinism, SMALL_TYPE_SIZES table, and 9-byte varint
continuation bits. All 42 serial_type tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
